title: Pectinopitys standleyi

Pectinopitys standleyi is considered to be a member of the order Magnoliales. The species is also known as the "Standley's Pectinopitys" and is closely related to other magnolia species. Further classification of Pectinopitys standleyi may require more specific studies and research in the field of botany.

Traditionally, Pectinopitys standleyi has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
